description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE as ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}_${CI_BUILD_REF}_test and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE as ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest, and add a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF that stores src/static/dist. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, then docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. In the release stage add a release job that runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and it should run on runners tagged docker.
